title: Ransomware encryption attempt blocked
description: Ransomware encryption attempt blocked - incident detected and resolved in Q4 2025
resolution_summary: Ransomware encryption attempt blocked resolved successfully. Systems restored to normal operation
root_cause_analysis: Root cause analysis completed for ransomware_detection incident
business_impact: Multiple endpoints compromised, potential for lateral movement, data at risk
remediation_actions: Isolated and secured affected systems: endpoint-256, file-shares
Applied immediate patches and configuration updates to affected components
Verified system integrity and restored normal operations
Conducted security validation and compliance checks
preventive_measures: Enhanced monitoring and alerting for similar attack patterns and anomalies
Updated security policies and access control mechanisms
Implemented additional validation and testing procedures
Scheduled regular security audits and compliance reviews
documentation_updated: Incident response runbook updated with lessons learned
lessons_learned: Root cause analysis completed for ransomware_detection incident
follow_up_tasks: Conduct post-incident review with all stakeholders
Update disaster recovery and business continuity plans
Schedule training sessions for affected teams
Implement long-term preventive measures by Q1 2026
resolution: Ransomware encryption attempt blocked resolved successfully. Systems restored to normal operation
action_taken: Resolved by endpoint-team within 106 minutes of detection
